title: docs: add Indonesian Getting Started guide
body_text:
### Description
This PR introduces a draft for an Indonesian "Getting Started" guide ([PANDUAN_MULA_CEPAT.md](cci:7://file:///d:/Test%20Gemini%20CLI/langchain/PANDUAN_MULA_CEPAT.md:0:0-0:0)). 

As LangChain's adoption continues to grow globally, having entry-level documentation in local languages can significantly lower the barrier to entry for new developers. This initial guide covers the basic setup, initializing Chat Models, Prompt Templates, creating simple LCEL chains, and using Output Parsers.

I am open to feedback on whether this should be placed in a specific localized-docs directory or if there are other areas I should expand on for Indonesian users!

### Contribution Checklist
- [x] I have read the [Contributing Guide](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/contributing/overview).
- [x] This is a documentation addition (no code/tests needed).
- [x] My changes generate no new warnings.
- [x] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works (Not Applicable).
